sections.paragraph:
ἀντιμισϑία, ας, ἡ [ἀντί, μισθός; ‘that which is given in return’] ‘requital in recognition of what one deserves’

—a. positive sense reward, recompense ἀντιμισϑίαν πλατυνϑῆτε ϰαὶ ὑμεῖς in exchange make the same amount of room for us (in your hearts) 2 Cor 6:13.

—b. negative sense requital, penalty Ro 1:27.
